column1: # zap-baseline rule configuration (tabs between columns). See docs/security/ZAP_BASELINE_RULES.md.
# RuleId<TAB>LEVEL<TAB>(comment — ZAP appends after tab for human context only)

column3: (Strict-Transport-Security not set) — ZAP CI targets plain HTTP on the Docker bridge; HSTS is applied for HTTPS clients via UseHsts() in non-Development and at TLS-terminating ingress.
(X-Powered-By) — noise when absent; some reverse proxies add this; not controlled by the API process.
(Timestamp Disclosure) — ISO-8601 and numeric substrings in JSON (health, ProblemDetails, correlation ids) are operational metadata, not authentication secrets.
(HTTP Only Site) — expected: baseline URL is http://archlucid-zap-api:8080 inside an isolated CI network, not public cleartext.
